parts.text:
Let me check the `project_logs` for recent errors.

```sql
SELECT
    timestamp,
    message,
    source,
    details
FROM
    project_logs.abc-123
WHERE
    log_level = 'ERROR'
ORDER BY
    timestamp DESC
LIMIT 10;
```

This query will retrieve the timestamp, message, source, and any additional details for the 10 most recent error logs from `project_logs.abc-123`.
